metadata.description: Universal skills for cross-project agent workflows. Most reference skills are gated in _incubator/ pending a quality review pass (see docs/skill-review/README.md); only the Doppler secrets skill is active. skill-classifier ships as experimental.

plugins.name: frozen-skills
plugins.description: Doppler secrets-management skill. Other reference skills are gated in _incubator/ pending review (see docs/skill-review).

plugins.name: skill-classifier
plugins.description: WIP: two LLM-backed hooks (Ollama default, Gemini CLI fallback) — a skill classifier and a subagent-prompt quality gate
